UserComments.Comment: The charging station worx properly,but E.On company repeatedly performed deceptive behavior with goal to cheat U with pricing.For example their 8hrs.limit counts also for night,even they tell/write U the opposite,it is a trap,also they often charge U day-price(9.5CZK/KWh) also @ night(when they announce 8CZK/KWh),they r always lieing with pricing,be aware & do not forget interrupt charging every 8hrs.to avoid extra fees & do so also during night,they announced,that parking fee free minutes r not being deducted during night,but they R & by believing them 1ce,i was charged extra 745CZK.E.On is a highly deceptive company.

UsageCost: 6CZK/KWh. Max.8hrs.of continuous charging,if exceeded,every minute over 8hrs.is additionally charged by 2CZK.

AddressInfo.Title: E.On Public Charging Station(AC) in Parkovací dům Brandýs nad Labem(P+R/C+R).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access.@ the time of my visit parking for EVs was free.

GeneralComments: Roofed & clean charging station,good for C+R use(Charge+Ride),but due to time limit 8hrs.better for tourists than for commuting workers,if U r about to have a railroad trip,ensure,U can return within 8hrs.,nearest restaurant & thus nearest toilets across the railroad in parallel street,but unfortunatly due to a fence U will have to walk it around.Excellent for overnight charging,the time limit is just enough for a regular sleep.
